<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"$fd_bkpf_bukrs$","fieldText":"$公司代码$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.BUKRS","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$时间.日期格式化$($fd_3cfe06a37c22da$,\"yyyyMMdd\")","fieldText":"$时间.日期格式化$($过账日期$,\"yyyyMMdd\")","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.BLDAT","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$时间.日期格式化$($fd_3cfe06a37c22da$,\"yyyyMMdd\")","fieldText":"$时间.日期格式化$($过账日期$,\"yyyyMMdd\")","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.BUDAT","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_sel_bkpf_blart$","fieldText":"$凭证类型Sel$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.BLART","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_bkpf_waers$","fieldText":"$报销币种$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.WAERS","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_text_description$","fieldText":"$文本描述$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.BKTXT","defaultValue":""},{"field":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$fdId$","fieldText":"\"http://scop.shanghai-electric.com/km/review/km_review_main/kmReviewMain.do?method=view&fdId=\"+$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.OA_LINK","defaultValue":""},{"field":"import java.util.List; List nodeHandlers = $流程.获取节点实际处理人$(\"N38\"); if(null!=nodeHandlers && nodeHandlers.size()>0){ return nodeHandlers.get(0).fdNo; }","fieldText":"import java.util.List;List nodeHandlers = $流程.获取节点实际处理人$(\"N38\");if(null!=nodeHandlers && nodeHandlers.size()>0){return nodeHandlers.get(0).fdNo;}","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.XREF2_HD","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_no$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.行号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.BUZEI","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_course$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.科目$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.HKONT","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_local_amount$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.本位币金额$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.DMBTR","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_cost_center$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.成本中心$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.KOSTL","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_wbs$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.WBS要素$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.PROJK","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_order$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.订单$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.AUFNR","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_text$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.文本$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.SGTXT","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_prctr$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.利润中心$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.PRCTR","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_amount$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.金额$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.WRBTR","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_zuonr$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.分配$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.ZUONR","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_3e6e8f90af1a1c$","fieldText":"$流程类型$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.OA_PROCESS_TYPE","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_numpg$","fieldText":"$发票页数$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"IS_HEADER.NUMPG","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_z_payee$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.付款人$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.Z_PAYEE","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_finance_detail.fd_oa_accnt$","fieldText":"$财务预制表.卡号$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"$Rows$.IT_ITEM.OA_ACCNT","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[{"field":"fd_voucher_msg","fieldText":"预制凭证推送结果","dataType":"String","fieldName":"ES_RETURN"},{"field":"fd_voucher_no","fieldText":"SAP凭证号","dataType":"String","fieldName":"EV_BELNR"},{"field":"fd_link_address","fieldText":"Fiori凭证链接","dataType":"String","fieldName":"EV_LINK"}],"restfulUrl":"http://webapp08.shanghai-electric.com/dce-api/sjram-service/api/do/SCOP-EXP-2217/P11/610/ZBAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST_OA","restfulSecret":"62b1a9322c6b41ebb5fc338eb0370ea2","successParam":{"successFieldName":"success","successValue":"true"}}"
